indicator.name: DXY Trade Alert
indicator.description: Detects two trade setups on the DXY (US Dollar Index) during the London session. Uses the 23:45 GMT Open Zone as a structural reference level, then fires alerts for either an Attraction trade (price far from zone, pulling back toward it) or a Reversal trade (zone broken, retesting as support/resistance). Signals are confirmed by candlestick patterns.

open_zone.definition: The gap (or overlap) between the close of the candle immediately before 23:45 GMT and the open of the 23:45 GMT candle.
open_zone.rationale: The 23:45 GMT candle marks the start of the Japan session. The gap between the preceding candle's close and this candle's open defines a structural zone that price is expected to interact with during the London session.
open_zone.pristine_definition: Zone is PRISTINE if all Japan session candle CLOSES remain on the same side of the zone they started on. A close inside the zone is acceptable — pristine is only broken when a close crosses THROUGH to the opposite side (beyond the far edge).
open_zone.pristine_broken: If Japan is bullish (opens above zone), pristine breaks if any candle closes below zone_bottom. If Japan is bearish (opens below zone), pristine breaks if any candle closes above zone_top.
open_zone.visual: Displayed as a shaded orange box (pristine) or grey box (broken) on the chart.

attraction.description: Taken when the zone is PRISTINE. Price has moved a minimum distance away from the zone during the Japan session and is expected to be 'attracted' back toward the zone during London.

long_setup.condition: Japan session is bearish (opened below zone). Price is 150–500 pts below zone_bottom. Bullish candlestick signal fires during London session.
long_setup.target: zone_bottom (lower edge of the Open Zone)
long_setup.label: ATTRACTION LONG

short_setup.condition: Japan session is bullish (opened above zone). Price is 150–500 pts above zone_top. Bearish candlestick signal fires during London session.
short_setup.target: zone_top (upper edge of the Open Zone)
short_setup.label: ATTRACTION SHORT

defaults.note: 1 pt = 0.0001 DXY price. 1500 pts = 0.1500 DXY move.

reversal.description: Taken when the zone is BROKEN (pristine lost). Price has returned to the zone edge, which now acts as support or resistance, confirmed by a tap-and-reverse on the prior bar.

long_setup.condition: Japan was bearish. Price closes within 200 pts of zone_bottom. Prior bar's LOW pierced at least 75 pts below zone_bottom (tap and reject).
long_setup.label: REVERSAL LONG

short_setup.condition: Japan was bullish. Price closes within 200 pts of zone_top. Prior bar's HIGH pierced at least 75 pts above zone_top (tap and reject).
short_setup.label: REVERSAL SHORT

london_entry_window.rationale: Window extended to 12:00 GMT based on backtesting results. Monday opens 1 hour earlier to capture the weekly open gap.

japan_session.purpose: Sets the Open Zone and establishes directional bias. Zone pristine status monitored throughout this session.

session_rules.zone_reset: Zone top, bottom, and pristine status reset at each new 23:45 GMT bar.

entry_signals.description: Three candlestick confirmation patterns. At least one must fire during the London window for an alert to trigger.

engulfing_candle.bull_conditions: Current bar is bullish, prior bar is bearish. Current close > prior open, current open < prior close. Current body >= 80% of prior body.
engulfing_candle.bear_conditions: Current bar is bearish, prior bar is bullish. Current close < prior open, current open > prior close. Current body >= 80% of prior body.

pin_bar.bull_conditions: Lower wick >= body × wick_multiplier (default 2.0). Upper wick <= body × 1.5.
pin_bar.bear_conditions: Upper wick >= body × wick_multiplier (default 2.0). Lower wick <= body × 1.5.

3_bar_reversal.bull_conditions: Bar -2 is bearish. Bar -1 is indecision (body <= 50% of bar -2 body). Current bar is bullish and closes above bar -2 open.
3_bar_reversal.bear_conditions: Bar -2 is bullish. Bar -1 is indecision (body <= 50% of bar -2 body). Current bar is bearish and closes below bar -2 open.

distance_units.explanation: Distance is measured in 'pts' where 1 pt = 0.0001 DXY price (equivalent to 1 pip on a 4-decimal FX pair).

alerts.attraction_long: Fires when attr_long condition is true. Message includes pair direction guidance.
alerts.attraction_short: Fires when attr_short condition is true. Message includes pair direction guidance.
alerts.reversal_long: Fires when rev_long condition is true.
alerts.reversal_short: Fires when rev_short condition is true.
alerts.any_setup: Fires when any of the four conditions is true. Useful as a single catch-all alert.

visual_outputs.open_zone_box: Shaded band between zone_top and zone_bottom. Orange = pristine, grey = broken.
visual_outputs.attraction_bands: Dashed lines at zone_top ± attr_max_pts and zone_top ± attr_min_pts showing the valid attraction entry distance window.
visual_outputs.london_session_background: Light blue background shading during the London entry window.

labels.attraction_long: Green label below bar. Shows signal name, pts from zone, and target.
labels.attraction_short: Red label above bar. Shows signal name, pts from zone, and target.
